basic_details.job_title: BISAG-N Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bhaskaracharya National Institute for Space Applications and Geo-informatics (BISAG-N) has officially announced the Software Developer Recruitment 2026 with 15 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official BISAG-N website. Candidates who hold a B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA degree with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA and possess at least 2 years of relevant experience can now submit their applications through email. The application process is open and interested candidates must apply on or before 08 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA. Minimum 2 years of experience required.
qualification.details: Software Developer: B.E./B.Tech (CSE/CE/IT) or MCA Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CPI/CGPA from a recognized university Minimum 2 Years Experience Required

salary_details.details: Software Developer: Up to ₹70,000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BISAG-N Software Developer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
